channel.title: briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: My doctor keeps focusing on my weight. What other health metrics matter more?
item.description: Our Real Talk with a Doc columnist explains how to push back if your doctor's obsessed with weight loss. And what other health metrics matter more ins...

item.title: To Avoid Care Disruptions, Know When the Clock Runs Out on Your Prior Authorization
item.description: A Massachusetts woman knew the medicine her doctor prescribed required preauthorization, but she didn’t realize the approval had an expiration date. I...

item.title: Scientists find a new clue to help them identify a healthy gut microbiome
item.description: Scientists are still trying to identify what a healthy gut microbiome looks like, but new research may offer a clue.

item.title: He Needs an Expensive Drug. A Copay Card Helped — Until It Didn’t.
item.description: Diagnosed with an autoimmune disorder, a California man was prescribed a drug that costs thousands of dollars a month. He said he was reassured that t...

item.title: Cientos de enfermeros estadounidenses dejan atrás el Estados Unidos de Trump y eligen trabajar en Canadá
item.description: En particular llegan a British Columbia, donde más de 1.000 enfermeros y enfermeras formados en Estados Unidos han recibido autorización para trabajar...

item.title: The Vocabulary of Survival
item.description: By GEORGE BEAUREGARD From 2018 to 2022, I served as a physician executive in a large health system on Long Island. During that period, I became acquai...

item.title: Can't get a prescription renewed? Here's how to cope with prior authorizations
item.description: These health care hurdles can stand in the way of getting treatment your doctor says you need. Here's what to know about how to deal with them.

item.title: Why it's a bit surprising that the U.S. is attending a key global flu meeting
item.description: After the U.S. withdrew from the World Health Organization, it wasn't clear they would participate in this WHO-led meeting to determine the recipe for...

item.title: ‘You Aren’t Trapped’: Hundreds of US Nurses Choose Canada Over Trump’s America
item.description: More than 1,000 American nurses have successfully applied for licensure in British Columbia since April, a massive increase over prior years. Ontario ...

item.title: What the Health? From KFF Health News: What About the State of Health?
item.description: Health care got barely a mention in President Trump’s State of the Union address. Ahead of the midterms, the Trump administration has presented few co...

item.title: Here are 5 health topics Trump avoided in his SOTU speech
item.description: Despite President Trump's aim to make health care a "Republican issue" for the midterms, his speech left out scientific research, MAHA, abortion and r...

item.title: Will AI Solve Immunology’s Debate Over “Self vs. Non-Self?”
item.description: By MIKE MAGEE In 1872, English mathematician and sometimes poet, Augustus de Morgan, wrote this catching rhyme: “Great fleas have little fleas upon th...

item.title: Can We Ride the GenAI Wave Without Getting Subsumed by It?
item.description: By DAVID SHAYWITZ “There are decades where nothing happens; and there are weeks where decades happen,” said Lenin, probably never. It’s also a remarka...

item.title: Sofia Noori, Nema Health
item.description: Nema Health has cracked the code on PTSD and has an amazing study showing that their technique of intensive cognitive processing therapy is over 99% e...

item.title: AI replaces me: The Private AI Bubble Meets the Public Digital Health Reality Check
item.description: By CLAUDE.AI trying to write like me MATTHEW HOLT I finally did what I have been wanting to do for a while and had an AI ingest everything I’ve writte...
